evidence: The Group believes that markets like India, Romania, Tunisia, and other Eastern and Southeastern European countries have a high potential for continuous growth in the long term, and it plans to continue expanding by offering quality products made with innovative techniques. (Grupo Bimbo 2024 Annual Report, BMV filing)

Seventeen bakeries and plants were added, including six new plants in Mexico, India, China, Chile, and Paraguay, as well as the bakeries acquired through acquisitions. (Grupo Bimbo 2024 Annual Report)

It completed six acquisitions: Modern Foods in India, Emmy's Organics in the U.S., Cerealto Siro Foods in Spain, Popcornopolis in the U.S., Aryzta do Brasil and Kitty Industries in India. (Grupo Bimbo 2024 Annual Report, 2021 milestones section)
In May 2017, Grupo Bimbo acquired 65% of Ready Roti India Private Limited, a baking leader in New Delhi with sales of US$48 million in 2016. (Grupo Bimbo 2024 Annual Report, history section)
india_apac_interest.india_operations: Wholly-owned Bimbo India (Ready Roti 100% since 2021, plus Modern Foods and Kitty Industries acquisitions); ~14 India bakeries; one of the six new plants built in 2024 was in India.
india_apac_interest.report_used: Grupo Bimbo Annual Report 2024 (BMV filing, English)

companies.notes: India explicitly named a long-term high-potential growth market and received new plant capex in 2024; EAA division grew with double-digit growth in India. Caveat: 2022 India goodwill impairment of MXN 275M recognized (same report, note on cumulative impairments).

evidence: Our Asian and Oceania division, saw strong demand in all markets it serves but particularly in Malaysia and Australia. With our new plant in China adding to production, we have been able to dilute the incremental costs and destress operational leverage accordingly. We expect this effect to continue as we increase production in this plant on the back of greater demand. (GRUMA 4Q25 earnings report, 2026)

Net sales increased 2% to US$1.6 billion, mainly driven by strong performance in Europe, Asia & Oceania, and Central America, supported by a favorable price mix and higher demand in each one of these subsidiaries. (GRUMA 4Q25 earnings report, 2026)
india_apac_interest.india_operations: None in India; dedicated GRUMA Asia & Oceania division (Malaysia, China, Australia) with a new China plant ramping production.
india_apac_interest.report_used: GRUMA Annual Report 2024 + GRUMA 4Q25 earnings report

companies.notes: Concrete APAC investment (new China plant, Asia-Oceania operating income +37% YoY in 4Q25) but zero India language in either document.

companies.company: Sociedad Quimica y Minera de Chile (SQM)

evidence: On April 22, 2024, the subsidiary SQM India Private Limited was incorporated. (SQM Form 20-F, FY2024)

SQM India Private Limited ... LEVAL 3A WING, TOWER B1 Symphony IT park, NANDED, Nanded, Pune City, Pune - 411041, Maharashtra India ... 100.0000 [percent ownership] (SQM Form 20-F FY2024, subsidiaries table)
Potassium sales volumes grew by more than 28% in 2024 compared to 2023, driven by strong market demand in key regions such as Brazil, Europe, and India. (SQM Form 20-F, FY2024)
During 2024, 93% of our sales of lithium were in Asia. (SQM Form 20-F, FY2024)

We are also developing the Mt. Holland lithium project in Australia through our joint venture with Wesfarmers. The concentrator plant is ramping up production to nameplate capacity, while the Kwinana lithium hydroxide refinery continues to advance in construction, with 95% completion ... and a planned production capacity of 50,000 metric tons of lithium hydroxide (50% SQM's share). (SQM Form 20-F, FY2024)

approximately US$200 million for the SQM Lithium International Division, which includes the completion of the construction of the lithium hydroxide refining plant in Kwinana, Australia, and exploration-related investments. (SQM Form 20-F, FY2024)
india_apac_interest.india_operations: SQM India Private Limited, 100%-owned staffed subsidiary incorporated 22-Apr-2024 in Pune, Maharashtra; India also named as a key potassium demand region.

companies.notes: India disclosure is a subsidiary-footnote/table item, not a strategy-narrative statement; graded HIGH because an incorporated, staffed 100%-owned Indian subsidiary is a concrete India investment in SQM's own reporting. Separately (press, NOT SQM reporting; Reuters/Mining Weekly, 28-Mar-2025): India's KABIL consortium (Coal India/Oil India/ONGC Videsh) reported to be seeking a ~20% (~US$600M) stake in SQM's Australian lithium projects. 93% of lithium revenue is Asian; concrete APAC capex via Mt Holland JV (Wesfarmers) and Kwinana refinery.

evidence: On September 19, 2024, the Brazilian government initiated an anti-dumping investigation into imports of pre-painted steel from China and India. (Ternium Form 20-F, FY2024)

March 2021: JSW Steel announced the acquisition of Bhushan Power and Steel Ltd under the provisions of India's insolvency bankruptcy code. (Ternium Form 20-F FY2024, industry-consolidation background section)
india_apac_interest.india_operations: None; all 11 India mentions in the 20-F are anti-dumping/trade-defense or industry-consolidation context, and Asia mentions are sales logistics.

companies.notes: India appears only as an import-competition threat and industry backdrop — no APAC investment interest. Profitability screened on NYSE ADR (TX, USD); Ternium Argentina (TXAR.BA) also profitable (margin 9.5%, ROE 4.2%, ARS).

evidence: Los mercados mas importantes para la Compania son los de Estados Unidos, Latinoamerica y Asia. [The Company's most important markets are the United States, Latin America and Asia.] (Aluar Prospecto de Emision, 2025)
en Asia los clientes son exclusivamente las companias de trading japonesas [in Asia the clients are exclusively Japanese trading companies] (Aluar Prospecto de Emision, 2025)
india_apac_interest.india_operations: None; Asia exposure is exports (~80% of volume exported overall) sold via Japanese trading houses (~5% of exports to Japan per FIX SCR rating report); zero India mentions in the 247-page prospectus.
india_apac_interest.report_used: Aluar Prospecto de Emision 2025 (247pp) + FIX SCR rating report

companies.notes: Asia is an export destination handled by Japanese trading intermediaries, not an investment target; capex is entirely domestic (Puerto Madryn smelter, wind power). Revenue growth figure inflated by ARS terms.
